name: Perennial Energy Holdings Limited
summary: Perennial Energy Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, operates as a coal mining company in the People's Republic of China. The company principally engages in the exploration and mining of coking coal and coal refinery. It operates three underground coal mines comprising Hongguo Mine with a licensed area of 3.0225 sq. km; Baogushan Mine covering a licensed area of 2.4736 sq. km; and Xiejiahegou Mine with a licensed area of 1.0135 sq. km located in Panzhou City, Guizhou Province. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Liupanshui, China. Perennial Energy Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Spring Snow Management Limited.
